generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that reducing our alliance commitments could actually make us safer? By focusing on smart deterrence strategies and modernizing our own defenses, we can protect our civil liberties while ensuring national security. Other nations need to take more responsibility for their own defense - it's time we prioritize preparedness that works for us. #StrongerTogether #SmartSecurity
